title: Budget Planner Couples
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Money fights are the #1 predictor of divorce. This budget planner is the antidote.

Built specifically for couples, this 132-page workbook turns "the money talk" from a dreaded fight into a 20-minute monthly ritual you actually look forward to. Whether you're newlyweds, long-married, or moving in for the first time - this is the planner that gets you on the same financial page.

Who it's for:
- Married, engaged, and cohabiting couples managing joint finances
- Partners who don't agree on saving vs. spending styles
- Couples with shared goals: house, baby, debt-free, retirement, travel

What's inside:
- Joint values + goals worksheets: define "enough" together before you split a single bill
- 12 monthly budgets: income, fixed bills, variable categories, sinking funds
- Bi-weekly money date templates: 5 questions, 20 minutes, zero blame
- Debt avalanche/snowball trackers and net-worth check-ins
- His / Hers / Ours columns so personal autonomy stays intact

Use it side-by-side at the kitchen table once a month. Couples who track together stay together - and retire richer.

Stop guessing where the paycheck went. Order today and have the money talk you've been avoiding - on paper, on purpose, on the same team.
categories: BISAC: BUSINESS & ECONOMICS / Personal Finance / Budgeting
